title: User Pvc Issues
text:
```sh
    xfs_repair -L /dev/rbd5
    ```

    8. After repair, try mounting again:

    ```sh
    mount /dev/rbd5 /mnt
    ```

    9. Verify the filesystem:

    ```sh
    ls -lah /mnt
    ```

    10. Once everything looks good, unmount and unmap the device:

    ```sh
    umount /mnt
    rbd unmap /dev/rbd5
    ```


    ---
  </TabItem>

    <TabItem label="Draining Storage Nodes">

    Make sure no PVCs (running pods) are using the storage class.
    
  </TabItem>
</Tabs>
